title: Man dies in Bill Jeffery Drive accident
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 58-year-old man has died...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 58-year-old man has died in an accident in Bill Jeffery Drive this afternoon, 2 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 58-year-old man has died in an accident in Bill Jeffery Drive this afternoon, 2 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Police spokesperson, Sgt Chris Spies says the incident happened at around 13:00 at the entrance to PetroSA. Spies says three vehicles were involved."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He says the deceased was declared dead on the scene. The circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known.","html":"He says the deceased was declared dead on the scene. The circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Da Gamaskop police have opened a case of culpable homicide. The identity of the deceased has not yet been released.","html":"The Da Gamaskop police have opened a case of culpable homicide. The identity of the deceased has not yet been released."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man dies in Bill Jeffery Drive accident
